_comment: Ogle offline demo — HEALTHY baseline signatures for the churn serving path. Feed this first to seed baselines (exit 0), then feed drifted-signatures.json to fire the alert. URNs match scripts/inject-ml-lineage.py so the offline demo mirrors the live DataHub demo. Two serving-path tables feed the churn model: dbt.orders (a raw source) and dbt.churn_features (the engineered feature table). customers is a non-serving side table left unchanged so the alert stays scoped to the real blast radius.

signatures._comment: The engineered feature table the churn model trains and serves on. Schema, row count and null rates all stay healthy across the drift — the failure lives entirely in the value distributions, which is exactly what the moment-aware dimensions (distribution/mean/stdev/range) exist to catch.
